title: Cursed Ascensions
description: Cursed Ascensions is here to shake up your world with a bang! Imagine this: ancient, cursed artifacts that pack a punch and offer insane power—but hold on, they come with some serious risks. If you’re into exploring dark, mystical powers
body:
Dive into a wild adventure where ancient, cursed artifacts offer insane power but come with some serious risks. If you’re into exploring dark, mystical forces and tackling big challenges, this mod is your next stop.

What’s in Store:
Cursed Objects: These bad boys are scattered everywhere, ready for you to discover. They give you epic abilities, but each comes with dangerous side effects. It’s a high-stakes game of power versus peril. Think you can handle it?

Potential System: Unlock the full strength of these artifacts with the 100% Potential System. Feeling daring? The ???% Potential System introduces a wild card with unpredictable outcomes. It could push your power to the max or unleash chaos. Are you up for the gamble?

Cursed Dungeons: Explore dungeons packed with cursed enemies and hidden treasures. These places will push your skills and strategies to the limit. Conquer them for some serious rewards.

Quests and Curses: Get into quests that let you lift curses or hunt down new, powerful artifacts. Whether you’re battling fierce foes or solving tricky puzzles, there’s always something exciting on the horizon.

Enemies and Bosses: Face off against cursed creatures and epic bosses, each with their own dark abilities. These battles are designed to keep you on your toes and make every fight a memorable challenge.

Loot with a Twist: Find rare, cursed loot that gives you a serious boost. But be careful—using these items can come with major risks. It’s all about deciding whether the power is worth the gamble.

Why Dive In?
This mod offers a thrilling mix of dark magic and high-risk adventure. With its powerful cursed artifacts, unpredictable potential, and challenging dungeons, it’s all about embracing the thrill of mastering dangerous powers and overcoming epic challenges. Ready to see what you’re really made of?


- Mod in **_BETA_**
- Inspired by **_Jujutsu Kaisen_**, _**Bleach**_ and _**Mob Psycho 100**_
